message:
substrate(rvdna,ruqu): scaffold v0.0.1 BackendAdapters + App Store wiring

iter 18+19 of /loop. Bumps rvDNA v2 + ruQu v2 PROPOSED → SCAFFOLDED.

rvdna-backend (ADR-007 §6 v0.0):
  - RvdnaT0Backend impl BackendAdapter (id / list_collections /
    pull_vectors / generation) + bump_generation for cache rotation.
  - Witness derivation byte-isomorphic to RuLakeBundle::new with
    memory_class("genomic"); model revision flows through data_ref so
    ESM-2 v0.4.1 vs v0.5.0 over identical DNA produce distinct
    witnesses (ADR-007 §c gotcha made explicit).
  - 6 tests pass: 3 witness invariants + 3 e2e (contract / cache
    round-trip / Fresh + gen-bump invalidation).

ruqu-backend (ADR-008 §4 v0.0):
  - RuquStateVectorBackend impl BackendAdapter — small-N exact
    simulator (≤16 qubits in v0.0).
  - Mini-IR: H/X/Y/Z/S/T/Rz/CX (universal w/ Rz). v0.0.2 will add an
    OpenQASM 3.0 frontend.
  - Witness derivation: ruqu://<id>@<backend-tag> URI so StateVector
    vs Stabilizer over the same circuit get distinct witnesses;
    memory_class("quantum") on the bundle.
  - 9 tests pass: 3 simulator (H, X, Bell-pair) + 3 witness
    (deterministic / backend-tag rotation / seed rotation) + 3 e2e.

App Store (ui/src/components/screens.jsx):
  - rvdna + ruqu cards now SCAFFOLDED with crates.io install lines
    that match the published package names.
  - New tag-amber CSS rule distinguishes SCAFFOLDED from
    SHIPPING/PROPOSED/ROADMAP at a glance.

Trust chain unchanged: both substrates produce SHAKE-256(32)
witnesses indistinguishable from native RuLakeBundle outputs — the
Console verifier, federation fan-out, and JSONL audit trail all
work without per-substrate special-casing.

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>

+# ruQu backend — quantum execution BackendAdapter (ADR-008).
+#
+# v0.0 ships the StateVector backend only — small-N exact simulation
+# with witness-anchored execution that round-trips through the ruLake
+# cache. Stabilizer / Clifford+T / TensorNetwork / Hardware backends
+# land in v0.1 / v0.2 per ADR-008 §4 and the ship table in
+# docs/research/ruqu/integration-with-rulake.md §1.6.
+#
+# Standalone Cargo package per ADR-001 (no root workspace; rulake from
+# crates.io v2.2 is the only ruLake-side dep).
+#
+# Scope of v0.0:
+#   - `RuquStateVectorBackend` (≤16 qubits to keep RAM bounded;
+#     production uses up to 25).
+#   - `Circuit` mini-IR: H, X, Y, Z, S, T, CNOT, RZ.
+#   - Witness derivation byte-isomorphic to a `RuLakeBundle` —
+#     `RuLakeBundle::new(data_ref="ruqu://<circuit-id>", dim=Hilbert,
+#     rotation_seed, rerank_factor=1, generation)`.
+#
+# Build:  cargo build --release
+# Test:   cargo test --release
+
+[package]
+name        = "ruvector-rulake-ruqu"
+version     = "0.0.1"
+edition     = "2021"
+rust-version = "1.89"
+license     = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
+authors     = ["Ruvector Team"]
+repository  = "https://github.com/ruvnet/RuLake"
+description = "ruQu v2 BackendAdapter for ruLake — quantum execution substrate, StateVector backend (ADR-008)"
+readme      = "README.md"
+
+[dependencies]
+rulake = "2.2"
+serde = { version = "1.0", features = ["derive"] }
+serde_json = "1.0"
+thiserror = "2.0"
+sha3 = "0.10"
+hex = "0.4"
+
+[dev-dependencies]
+tempfile = "3"
+
+[profile.release]
+opt-level     = 3
+lto           = "thin"
+codegen-units = 1

+//! Tiny mini-IR for v0.0 — enough to demonstrate the trust chain
+//! end-to-end without pulling in a full OpenQASM parser. v0.0.2 will
+//! add an OpenQASM 3.0 frontend per ADR-008 §6.
+
+use serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};
+
+/// One quantum gate operation. v0.0 covers Clifford + T + RZ; that's
+/// universal for unitary computation when combined.
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize, PartialEq)]
+#[serde(tag = "kind", rename_all = "snake_case")]
+pub enum Gate {
+    /// Hadamard on `q`.
+    H { q: u8 },
+    /// Pauli-X on `q`.
+    X { q: u8 },
+    /// Pauli-Y on `q`.
+    Y { q: u8 },
+    /// Pauli-Z on `q`.
+    Z { q: u8 },
+    /// S = diag(1, i) on `q`.
+    S { q: u8 },
+    /// T = diag(1, e^{iπ/4}) on `q`.
+    T { q: u8 },
+    /// Z-axis rotation by `theta` radians on `q`. Witness uses the
+    /// IEEE-754 bit pattern so byte-isomorphic on every platform.
+    Rz { q: u8, theta: f64 },
+    /// CNOT with `control` and `target` distinct qubits.
+    Cx { control: u8, target: u8 },
+}
+
+/// A compiled circuit. v0.0 stores gates verbatim — no rewrites,
+/// no scheduling. v0.1 will add a planner per ADR-008 §3.
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
+pub struct Circuit {
+    /// Number of qubits. State vector dim is `1 << n_qubits`.
+    pub n_qubits: u8,
+    /// Operations applied left-to-right.
+    pub gates: Vec<Gate>,
+    /// Stable identifier flowing into the witness `data_ref`.
+    /// Operators set this from a content hash of the source program.
+    pub id: String,
+}
+
+impl Circuit {
+    /// Empty circuit on `n` qubits.
+    pub fn new(id: impl Into<String>, n_qubits: u8) -> Self {
+        Self { id: id.into(), n_qubits, gates: Vec::new() }
+    }
+
+    /// Push a gate. Returns `&mut self` for ergonomic chaining.
+    pub fn push(&mut self, g: Gate) -> &mut Self {
+        self.gates.push(g);
+        self
+    }
+
+    /// Hilbert-space dimension. `1 << n_qubits`. Saturates at 31 to
+    /// keep the math `usize`-safe on 32-bit hosts (v0.0 caps at 16).
+    pub fn dim(&self) -> usize {
+        let n = self.n_qubits.min(31);
+        1usize << n
+    }
+}

+# rvDNA backend — `.rvdna` v2 file-format BackendAdapter (ADR-007).
+#
+# Hot-tier (T0) implementation for the rvDNA v2 file format: serves
+# k-mer vector batches from a memory-mapped `.rvdna` file's section 1
+# directly to the ruLake cache. Witness derived from the file's bundle
+# pointer at byte 0x00B0 — byte-isomorphic to a `RuLakeBundle` so two
+# deployments reading the same `.rvdna` file produce identical SHAKE-256
+# witnesses and share cache transparently.
+#
+# Standalone Cargo package per ADR-001 (no root workspace; rulake from
+# crates.io v2.2 is the only ruLake-side dep).
+#
+# v0.0 ships T0 only. T1 (warm mmap protein embeddings + attention) and
+# T2 (cold lazy raw DNA + epigenomic series) land in v0.1 / v0.2 per the
+# ship table in docs/research/rvdna/integration-with-rulake.md §1.6.
+#
+# Build:  cargo build --release
+# Test:   cargo test --release
+
+[package]
+name        = "ruvector-rulake-rvdna"
+version     = "0.0.1"
+edition     = "2021"
+rust-version = "1.89"
+license     = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
+authors     = ["Ruvector Team"]
+repository  = "https://github.com/ruvnet/RuLake"
+description = "rvDNA v2 BackendAdapter for ruLake — genomic substrate, hot-tier (T0) k-mer vectors via mmap (ADR-007)"
+readme      = "README.md"
+
+[dependencies]
+rulake = "2.2"
+serde = { version = "1.0", features = ["derive"] }
+serde_json = "1.0"
+thiserror = "2.0"
+sha3 = "0.10"
+hex = "0.4"
+
+[dev-dependencies]
+tempfile = "3"
+
+[profile.release]
+opt-level     = 3
+lto           = "thin"
+codegen-units = 1
